task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged in as 'demo_provider'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'demo_provider' or the provider's name in the user profile section, typically at the top right of the NOSH ChartingSystem interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the patient chart for Robert Murphy is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the patient name 'Robert Murphy' and DOB '08/15/1972' (or '1972-08-15') in the active patient banner or chart header.

task_completion.description: Verify an Imaging/Radiology order form is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Orders' section with an 'Imaging' or 'Radiology' form, dialog, or modal opened for the patient.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct imaging study details are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'MRI Lumbar Spine without Contrast' (or at least the terms 'MRI', 'Lumbar', 'Spine') typed into the test, study, or description field of the imaging order form.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct indication/reason is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Chronic lower back pain with left-sided radiculopathy' (or at least the terms 'back pain', 'radiculopathy') typed into the indication, reason, or diagnosis field of the imaging order form.

task_completion.description: Verify the imaging order is saved or submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the completed order appearing in the patient's order list, a success notification, or the agent clicking a 'Save', 'Sign', or 'Submit' button to finalize the order.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to create the order.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is interacting with the NOSH ChartingSystem web interface in a browser, not using curl, API requests, or terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with actual form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the text was entered into actual input fields in the web application rather than editing HTML via Developer Tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database access.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows open showing SQL queries or database modifications to insert the order directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Robert Murphy (DOB: 1972-08-15). Order Type: Radiology/Imaging ('rad'). Required Study Terms: 'MRI', 'Lumbar', 'Spine'. Required Indication Terms: 'back pain', 'radiculopathy'.
